hashGenerator.securityMd5: MD5 is cryptographically broken and should not be used for security purposes
hashGenerator.securitySha1: SHA-1 is deprecated and vulnerable to collision attacks
hashGenerator.securitySha256: SHA-256 is currently considered secure for most applications

htpasswdGenerator.errorUsernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
htpasswdGenerator.usage1: 1. Copy the generated entry to your .htpasswd file
htpasswdGenerator.usage2: 2. Configure your web server to use the .htpasswd file for authentication
htpasswdGenerator.usage3: 3. For Apache, add this to your .htaccess or virtual host configuration:

strongPasswordGenerator.title: Strong Password Generator
strongPasswordGenerator.subtitle: Generate secure passwords with customizable options and QR code export
strongPasswordGenerator.easyToSayHint: Avoids ambiguous characters like 0, O, l, 1
strongPasswordGenerator.passwordPlaceholder: Click 'Generate Password' to create a password
strongPasswordGenerator.securityNoteQr: QR codes contain your password in plain text. Only share or save QR codes in secure locations.
strongPasswordGenerator.errorSelectType: Please select at least one character type

credentialDetector.title: Credential Format Detector
credentialDetector.subtitle: Advanced analysis of passwords and credentials to detect format, security level, and provide recommendations
credentialDetector.analysisDescription: Enter a password or credential to analyze its format and security characteristics
credentialDetector.label: Password/Credential
credentialDetector.placeholder: Enter the password or credential to analyze...
credentialDetector.entropyHelp: Shannon Entropy: Measures randomness (0-8 scale). Higher values indicate more random/complex data.
credentialDetector.lengthHelp: Length: Number of characters. Longer is generally more secure for passwords.
credentialDetector.typesHelp: Character Types: Variety of character classes used (uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols).
credentialDetector.confidenceHelp: Confidence: How certain the analysis is about the detected format.
